debug_info.goal:
d : Type u_1
inst✝² : Fintype d
inst✝¹ : DecidableEq d
𝕜 : Type u_5
inst✝ : RCLike 𝕜
A B : Matrix d d 𝕜
hA : A.IsHermitian
hB : B.IsHermitian
hAB : Commute A B
j : d
⊢ A.mulVec ((@Matrix.sharedEigenbasis d inst✝² inst✝¹ 𝕜 inst✝ A B hA hB hAB) j) =
    @Matrix.SharedEigenbasis.sharedEigenvalueA d inst✝² inst✝¹ 𝕜 inst✝ A B hA hB hAB j •
      WithLp.ofLp ((@Matrix.sharedEigenbasis d inst✝² inst✝¹ 𝕜 inst✝ A B hA hB hAB) j)

have h := (sharedEigenbasis hA hB hAB).orthonormal

  have h_eigen_A : A.toEuclideanLin (sharedEigenbasis hA hB hAB j) = μ₁ • sharedEigenbasis hA hB hAB j :=

  have h_real : μ₁ = RCLike.ofReal (RCLike.re μ₁) := by

    · simp [RCLike.ofReal_re, hA.isHermitian]

have h_symm : (A.toEuclideanLin).IsSymmetric := isHermitian_iff_isSymmetric.mp hA
  have h_comm : Commute A.toEuclideanLin B.toEuclideanLin := commute_euclideanLin hAB
  have h_basis := sharedEigenbasis hA hB hAB
  have h_eigenspace : ∀ i, A.toEuclideanLin (h_basis i) = (sharedEigenvalueA hA hB hAB i) • h_basis i := by

    simp only [DirectSum.IsInternal.directSum_decomp_apply] at h_joint
    have h_mem : h_basis i ∈ ⨆ (μ₁₂ : Eigenvalues A.toEuclideanLin × Eigenvalues B.toEuclideanLin),

      exact Submodule.mem_top _
    obtain ⟨μ₁, μ₂, h_mem₁, h_mem₂⟩ := Submodule.mem_iSup_of_directSum h_mem
    rw [← h_mem₁, ← h_mem₂]
    simp [sharedEigenvalueA, dotProduct, inner_smul_left, RCLike.re_smul, smul_eq_mul]
    have h_eigen : A.toEuclideanLin (h_basis i) = μ₁ • h_basis i := by
      exact Submodule.mem_eigenspace.mp h_mem₁
    rw [h_eigen]
    simp [RCLike.re_smul, RCLike.re_coe_real]
  rw [← h_eigenspace j]
  simp [Matrix.mulVec, LinearMap.coeFn_toEuclideanLin]

  simp_all [Matrix.sharedEigenvalueA, dotProduct, Matrix.mulVec]

have h := (LinearMap.sharedEigenbasis (isHermitian_iff_isSymmetric.mp hA)
    (isHermitian_iff_isSymmetric.mp hB) (commute_euclideanLin hAB)).apply_def j
  simp_all [Matrix.sharedEigenvalueA, dotProduct, Matrix.mulVec]

have h_symm : (LinearMap.sharedEigenbasis (isHermitian_iff_isSymmetric.mp hA)
      (isHermitian_iff_isSymmetric.mp hB) (commute_euclideanLin hAB)) j ∈
      eigenspace (A.toEuclideanLin) (sharedEigenvalueA hA hB hAB j) := by
    apply Submodule.mem_of_mem_span_singleton
    simp only [sharedEigenvalueA, RCLike.re, dotProduct, inner_eq_re_dotProduct,
      LinearMap.mem_eigenspace_iff, PiLp.ofLp_apply]
    rw [← Matrix.mulVec_toEuclideanLin]
    rfl
  rw [LinearMap.mem_eigenspace_iff] at h_symm
  convert h_symm
  simp [Matrix.toEuclideanLin_apply]

have h_symm : (A.toEuclideanLin).IsSymmetric := isHermitian_iff_isSymmetric.mp hA
  have h_comm : Commute A.toEuclideanLin B.toEuclideanLin := commute_euclideanLin hAB
  have h_basis := sharedEigenbasis hA hB hAB
  have h_eigenspace : ∀ i, A.toEuclideanLin (h_basis i) = (sharedEigenvalueA hA hB hAB i) • h_basis i := by
    intro i
    have h_mem : h_basis i ∈ eigenspace A.toEuclideanLin (sharedEigenvalueA hA hB hAB i) := by
      rw [mem_eigenspace]
      simp [sharedEigenvalueA, dotProduct, inner_smul_left, h_symm.re_apply_eq]
    exact h_mem
  rw [← h_eigenspace j]
  simp [Matrix.mulVec, LinearMap.coe_toEuclideanLin]

have h := sharedEigenbasis hA hB hAB
  have h_symmA := isHermitian_iff_isSymmetric.mp hA
  have h_symmB := isHermitian_iff_isSymmetric.mp hB
  have h_comm := commute_euclideanLin hAB
  have h_eigen := h.directSum_isInternal_of_commute' h_symmA h_symmB h_comm
  simp [sharedEigenvalueA, dotProduct, inner_smul_left, RCLike.re_smul, smul_eq_mul]
  have h_mem : h j ∈ eigenspace (A.toEuclideanLin) (sharedEigenvalueA hA hB hAB j) := by
    apply Submodule.mem_of_mem_iSup
    use (⟨sharedEigenvalueA hA hB hAB j, ?_⟩, ⟨_, ?_⟩)
    · refine' ⟨h j, _, _⟩
      · simp [sharedEigenvalueA, dotProduct, inner_smul_left, RCLike.re_smul, smul_eq_mul]
      · simp [hA.mulVec_re_dotProduct_eq_smul]
    · refine' ⟨h j, _, _⟩
      · simp [sharedEigenvalueA, dotProduct, inner_smul_left, RCLike.re_smul, smul_eq_mul]
      · simp [hB.mulVec_re_dotProduct_eq_smul]
  simp_all [Submodule.mem_eigenspace, LinearMap.coe_toEuclideanLin]

have h_basis := Matrix.sharedEigenbasis hA hB hAB
  have h_symmA := isHermitian_iff_isSymmetric.mp hA
  have h_symmB := isHermitian_iff_isSymmetric.mp hB
  have h_comm := commute_euclideanLin hAB
  have h_eigen := LinearMap.IsSymmetric.directSum_isInternal_of_commute' h_symmA h_symmB h_comm
  have h_mem := h_eigen.2 (sharedEigenbasis hA hB hAB j)
  simp only [Submodule.mem_iSup_iff_exists_finsupp] at h_mem
  rcases h_mem with ⟨f, hf_support, hf_sum⟩
  have h_j_in := hf_support j
  simp only [Submodule.mem_inf, mem_genEigenspace_one] at h_j_in
  exact h_j_in.1
